title: Testosterone result review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting compatible symptoms, consistently low morning testosterone context, reliable assay or reference-range context and clinician-selected LH, FSH or further evaluation.
assessment.rationale: The exact diagnostic section supports result source and date, compatible symptom and negative context, focused examination and clinician-reviewed hormone results without diagnosing hypogonadism.

source.title: Testosterone Therapy in Men With Hypogonadism: An Endocrine Society Clinical Practice Guideline
source.jurisdiction: International specialty guideline; UAE laboratory, prescribing and referral policy governs local use
source.population: Adult men with symptoms or signs compatible with testosterone deficiency and clinician-reviewed testosterone results.
source.setting: Clinician evaluation of possible hypogonadism and monitoring after clinician-selected testosterone therapy.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting symptom context, reliable morning result verification, cause evaluation, contraindication discussion and clinician follow-up. It does not diagnose hypogonadism or authorise therapy.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1–1.4 — symptoms, repeat morning result and cause evaluation

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting compatible symptoms, consistently low morning testosterone context, reliable assay or reference-range context and clinician-selected LH, FSH or further evaluation.

assessment.text: Supports documenting fertility plans, comorbidity and contraindication context and shared benefit-risk discussion; no therapy is selected.
assessment.rationale: The exact individualized risk-discussion section supports patient goals, measured weight, clinician plan and questions when documented; it does not select testosterone therapy.

source.title: Testosterone Therapy in Men With Hypogonadism: An Endocrine Society Clinical Practice Guideline
source.jurisdiction: International specialty guideline; UAE laboratory, prescribing and referral policy governs local use
source.population: Adult men with symptoms or signs compatible with testosterone deficiency and clinician-reviewed testosterone results.
source.setting: Clinician evaluation of possible hypogonadism and monitoring after clinician-selected testosterone therapy.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting symptom context, reliable morning result verification, cause evaluation, contraindication discussion and clinician follow-up. It does not diagnose hypogonadism or authorise therapy.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 2.1–2.6 — individualized treatment and risk discussion

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting fertility plans, comorbidity and contraindication context and shared benefit-risk discussion; no therapy is selected.

assessment.text: Supports clinician review of response, adverse effects, adherence and monitoring after treatment initiation without generating thresholds, doses or referral.
assessment.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports prior specialist correspondence, safety-net documentation and arranged follow-up only when treatment or review is clinician-led.
